questions.question: Explain the difference between variance and standard deviation in the context of feature scaling. Provide one technique to handle high variance features.
questions.hint: Consider the implications of both methods on the model's performance

questions.question: Which dimensionality reduction technique is suitable for capturing the underlying structure of high-dimensional data? Justify your answer with an example.
questions.hint: Consider the characteristics of the data and the goals of dimensionality reduction

questions.question: What is the primary goal of feature selection in machine learning? Provide an example of a feature selection criterion (e.g. correlation, mutual information).
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between model interpretability and model performance
